titleStmt.title: SII 41.258: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 258. (A.R. No. 476 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

p.hi: Vijayanagara. Sadasivadeva-Maharaya, Saka 1484, Rudhirodgarin, Mithuna, Purva 7, Sunday, Atta = 1562, June 28.

summary.p: Registers a poliyūṭṭu endowment of 1500 paṇam made by Vedamarga-pratishthacharya Dharamasivacharya, the Head of the maṭha called Uḷmaḍam at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu for the celebration of the vasanta festival in the temple. The money was used for constructing the waste weir to the reservoir of Paḻaiyanūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śasti . śrīman mahāmaṇṭaleśvara rācarācaparamecura śrīvirapratāpa śrī viracatāciva tevamakārāyar prativirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam 1000 4 100 8 10 4 mel cellā niṉṟa ruturoṟkāri samvaccarattu mituṉa nāyaṟṟu pūṟrva pakṣattu cattamiyum Ātitta vāramum Atta nakṣattiramum peṟṟa yiṟṟai nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭakarai maṇavil koṭṭattu paḻaiyaṉūr ṉāṭṭil paḻaiyaṉūr tiruvālaṅkāṭṭil Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāvuṭaiya nayiṉār śrīkāriyam ceyvārum Ikkoyil tāṉattārum tiruvālaṅkāṭu Uḷmaṭam vetamāṟka pratiṣṭāpacāriyarāṉa
vaṭāraṇṇiśvara caraṇāravinta tiyānapārāyaṇarāṉa tanmacivācāriyaṟku tiruvacanta tiruṉāḷ poliyūṭṭu cātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta Innayiṉār Antamil Aḻakapperumāḷum ṉācciyār ceppentiḷamulai nācciāṟkum cadhittiṟacuttil tiruvātirai nakṣatrim mutal Ākavum cotinakṣatrittu nāḷ teṟpattiruvulāc ceytaruḷavum koṭikkampattukku vaṭakku taṉmacivācāriyar Uṭaiya vacantamaṇṭapattil Ēṟiaruḷi tiruṉāḷ pattukkum nāḷ Oṉṟukku maṇṭapa ciṟappukku Amutupaṭi 2 100 payaṟu 1araikkāl 4§ pānakattukkum paṇṇiyārattukkum vellam 3 teṅkāy 5
vāḻaippaḻam 100yiḷanīr 10karumpu 2 10kaṟpūram pa viṭai kastūripa viṭai 1 cantanam vicai 4nāḷ pattukkum paniniṟ cempuvicai 2 Aṭaikkāy yilaiamutukku pa 5 Erikkarumpukku pa2 Uppu Amutukku pa 1/4 neyikku pa 2 naṟpūvukku pa 3 10tiruvītippantattukkum tiruvolakkattukkum cellum Eṇṇai 6 100 Inta tirunāḷai nokki cellum cilavu Uṇṭānatum śrī paṇṭārattile poliyūṭṭāka naṭatta paḻaiyaṉūr Erikku teṟku kaliṅku kaṭṭa kuṭutta paṇam1000 2 100 pālaivāyil paṅku tirukkoyil pāti nikki niṉṟa pātiyum mahājanaṅkaḷ kaiyil taṉmacivācāriyar Āyirattu Aññūṟu paṇattukku
koṇṭa kiṟāmam pātiyum tirukkoyilile kaikkoṇṭu Inta vacanta tiruṉāḷukku varuṣam varuṣamtoṟum Inta kaṭṭaḷaipaṭi Ellām tirukkoyil mutalile cantiṟātitta varaiyum naṭatti varakkaṭavom Ākavum Inta vacantamaṇṭapattil Amutu ceytaruḷina piṟacātam paṇṇi Ākavākattukku viṭṭavar viḻukkāṭu ṉāliloṉṟum tanmacivācāriyar peṟṟukkoḷḷa kaṭavar Ākavum Inta tanmattukku Akitam Eṉṟiyile naṭatta kaṭavom Ākavum Inta tarumattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavan keṅkaikaraiile primaddhi koṣaddhi śrīaddhipaṇṇina
The following three lines are along with the above inscription in different hand style of the same period.

paṇam Aimpatu Ippaṇam Aimpatukku Iṉṉilam vilaiyāvatu Ākavum Itukku Uḷḷu maṭakka
Irāyavipāṭaṉkol kuḻi nūṟu comaracarkku naṉṟāka vāḻamaramu māmaramu vaikkiṟati
kuḻi Irunūṟum Ivarke cantirātittavaraiyum sarvamānniya Iṟaiyili Āka viṭṭom
Digital edition of SII 41.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
